'''Ichtor 8''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ichtor system/Legends|Ichtor system]] that was the site on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] resort for wealthy [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The planet was very [[Water/Legends|icy]] and also had abundant natural resources. The planet also contained a ski resort on [[Mount Quavaar]]. The [[stohl]] creature, a popular guard pet, was native to Ichtor 8. The species was first discovered by Imperial [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]. [[Hunting/Legends|Hunters]] were soon enamored of the inquisitive creatures, and the creatures were exported at a high price. [[Holovid/Legends|Holovid]] star [[Shantee Ren|Shantee Ree]] made attack stohls fashionable. When her pet attack stohl [[Needla]] bit a fan wanting an autograph, the resulting media coverage made the attack stohl a popular target for daredevil hunters. Ree then started a [[Save the Stohl]] campaign.

==History==
The planet was the site of a [[Battle of Ichtor|battle]] of the [[Western Reaches Operation]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Reconquest of the Rim]] in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

Madam [[Prisaal]] and her husband lived on this planet.<ref name="SWG:AMMH">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Avenge My Murdered Husband}} on Tatooine</ref>
